batch_boundary: blue-api.morpho.org listed:true snapshot 2026-06-02 (mainnet 73 + base 33 = 106 listed vaults)
note: MetaMorpho ERC-4626 vault universe. cover = top-8/chain by totalAssetsUsd (this round, concrete manifests). defer = long-tail listed vaults (same surface; full-universe via source-resolver is a documented follow-up). Vault instances are MetaMorphoFactory/MetaMorphoV1_1Factory children — routed by exact (chainId,vault,selector), so each is its own callkey.
